query:
-- Lesson 2 Questions
SET @lesson2_id = (SELECT id FROM lessons WHERE courseId = (SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'BIB101') AND lessonOrder = 2 LIMIT 1);
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(@lesson2_id, 'The Torah consists of how many books?', 'multiple_choice', '5', 1),
(@lesson2_id, 'Which book of the Torah contains the Ten Commandments?', 'multiple_choice', 'Exodus', 2),
(@lesson2_id, 'What does "Torah" mean?', 'multiple_choice', 'Law or Teaching', 3),
(@lesson2_id, 'Which covenant did God make with Abraham?', 'multiple_choice', 'The Abrahamic Covenant', 4),
(@lesson2_id, 'What is the Mosaic Covenant?', 'multiple_choice', 'The covenant established at Mount Sinai', 5),
(@lesson2_id, 'How many commandments are in the Torah?', 'multiple_choice', '613', 6),
(@lesson2_id, 'Which book describes Israel\'s wilderness wandering?', 'multiple_choice', 'Numbers', 7),
(@lesson2_id, 'What does Leviticus primarily deal with?', 'multiple_choice', 'Sacrificial system and priestly duties', 8),
(@lesson2_id, 'Who is the central figure in the Torah?', 'multiple_choice', 'Moses', 9),
(@lesson2_id, 'What is Deuteronomy?', 'multiple_choice', 'Moses\' farewell address and restatement of the Law', 10),
(@lesson2_id, 'Discuss how the Torah establishes the theological framework for all of Scripture.', 'short_answer', '', 11);

-- Lesson 3 Questions  
SET @lesson3_id = (SELECT id FROM lessons WHERE courseId = (SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'BIB101') AND lessonOrder = 3 LIMIT 1);
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(@lesson3_id, 'How many books are in the Historical Books section?', 'multiple_choice', '12', 1),
(@lesson3_id, 'Which book chronicles Israel\'s conquest of Canaan?', 'multiple_choice', 'Joshua', 2),
(@lesson3_id, 'What period does the book of Judges cover?', 'multiple_choice', 'The period of tribal judges', 3),
(@lesson3_id, 'Who is the central figure in 1 and 2 Samuel?', 'multiple_choice', 'David', 4),
(@lesson3_id, 'What is the Davidic Covenant?', 'multiple_choice', 'God\'s promise to establish David\'s dynasty', 5),
(@lesson3_id, 'Which king built the first temple in Jerusalem?', 'multiple_choice', 'Solomon', 6),
(@lesson3_id, 'What caused the division of the kingdom?', 'multiple_choice', 'Solomon\'s son Rehoboam\'s harsh policies', 7),
(@lesson3_id, 'What event is chronicled in 2 Kings 25?', 'multiple_choice', 'The fall of Jerusalem and exile', 8),
(@lesson3_id, 'Which books chronicle the return from exile?', 'multiple_choice', 'Ezra and Nehemiah', 9),
(@lesson3_id, 'What does the book of Esther demonstrate about God?', 'multiple_choice', 'God\'s providential care during the diaspora', 10),
(@lesson3_id, 'Analyze the pattern of faithfulness and unfaithfulness in Israel\'s history.', 'short_answer', '', 11);

-- Lesson 4 Questions
SET @lesson4_id = (SELECT id FROM lessons WHERE courseId = (SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'BIB101') AND lessonOrder = 4 LIMIT 1);
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(@lesson4_id, 'How many books are in the Wisdom Literature section?', 'multiple_choice', '5', 1),
(@lesson4_id, 'Which book addresses the problem of suffering?', 'multiple_choice', 'Job', 2),
(@lesson4_id, 'How many Psalms are in the book of Psalms?', 'multiple_choice', '150', 3),
(@lesson4_id, 'What type of literature is Proverbs?', 'multiple_choice', 'Wisdom sayings', 4),
(@lesson4_id, 'What is the main theme of Ecclesiastes?', 'multiple_choice', 'Life\'s meaning and the vanity of human pursuits', 5),
(@lesson4_id, 'What does the Song of Solomon celebrate?', 'multiple_choice', 'Human love and intimacy', 6),
(@lesson4_id, 'What is a characteristic of Hebrew poetry?', 'multiple_choice', 'Parallelism and metaphor', 7),
(@lesson4_id, 'What is the "fear of the Lord" in wisdom literature?', 'multiple_choice', 'Reverence and respect for God', 8),
(@lesson4_id, 'Which Psalm is known as the Shepherd Psalm?', 'multiple_choice', 'Psalm 23', 9),
(@lesson4_id, 'What does Proverbs 3:5-6 teach?', 'multiple_choice', 'Trust in the Lord with all your heart', 10),
(@lesson4_id, 'Explain how wisdom literature addresses life\'s fundamental questions.', 'short_answer', '', 11);

-- Lesson 5 Questions
SET @lesson5_id = (SELECT id FROM lessons WHERE courseId = (SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'BIB101') AND lessonOrder = 5 LIMIT 1);
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(@lesson5_id, 'How many chapters does Isaiah have?', 'multiple_choice', '66', 1),
(@lesson5_id, 'During which century did Isaiah minister?', 'multiple_choice', '8th century BCE', 2),
(@lesson5_id, 'What are the three main sections of Isaiah?', 'multiple_choice', 'Judgment, comfort, and restoration', 3),
(@lesson5_id, 'Which Isaiah passage prophesies a virgin birth?', 'multiple_choice', 'Isaiah 7:14', 4),
(@lesson5_id, 'What is Isaiah 53 about?', 'multiple_choice', 'The suffering servant', 5),
(@lesson5_id, 'How many times is Isaiah quoted in the New Testament?', 'multiple_choice', 'More than any other Old Testament book', 6),
(@lesson5_id, 'What does Isaiah 40:31 promise?', 'multiple_choice', 'Renewed strength for those who hope in the Lord', 7),
(@lesson5_id, 'What is the theme of Isaiah 1-39?', 'multiple_choice', 'Judgment', 8),
(@lesson5_id, 'What is the theme of Isaiah 40-55?', 'multiple_choice', 'Comfort and restoration', 9),
(@lesson5_id, 'What does the suffering servant do for others?', 'multiple_choice', 'Bears their sins vicariously', 10),
(@lesson5_id, 'Discuss how Isaiah\'s messianic prophecies point to Christ.', 'short_answer', '', 11);

-- Lesson 6 Questions
SET @lesson6_id = (SELECT id FROM lessons WHERE courseId = (SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'BIB101') AND lessonOrder = 6 LIMIT 1);
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(@lesson6_id, 'Why is Jeremiah called "the weeping prophet"?', 'multiple_choice', 'Because of his emotional response to Judah\'s sin', 1),
(@lesson6_id, 'For how long did Jeremiah prophesy?', 'multiple_choice', 'Over 40 years', 2),
(@lesson6_id, 'What was Jeremiah\'s main message?', 'multiple_choice', 'Call to repentance before Babylonian invasion', 3),
(@lesson6_id, 'What is the new covenant in Jeremiah 31:31-34?', 'multiple_choice', 'A covenant written on hearts', 4),
(@lesson6_id, 'What does Jeremiah 29:11 promise?', 'multiple_choice', 'Plans for welfare and hope', 5),
(@lesson6_id, 'What is Lamentations?', 'multiple_choice', 'Poetic laments over Jerusalem\'s destruction', 6),
(@lesson6_id, 'How many laments are in the book of Lamentations?', 'multiple_choice', 'Five', 7),
(@lesson6_id, 'When was Jerusalem destroyed?', 'multiple_choice', '586 BCE', 8),
(@lesson6_id, 'What does Lamentations 3:22-23 say about God\'s mercies?', 'multiple_choice', 'They are new every morning', 9),
(@lesson6_id, 'What does Jeremiah 23:5-6 prophesy?', 'multiple_choice', 'The righteous branch (Messiah)', 10),
(@lesson6_id, 'Explain how Jeremiah\'s message of judgment also includes hope.', 'short_answer', '', 11);

-- Lesson 7 Questions
SET @lesson7_id = (SELECT id FROM lessons WHERE courseId = (SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'BIB101') AND lessonOrder = 7 LIMIT 1);
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(@lesson7_id, 'During which period did Ezekiel and Daniel prophesy?', 'multiple_choice', 'Babylonian exile', 1),
(@lesson7_id, 'What is Ezekiel\'s famous vision?', 'multiple_choice', 'The throne chariot (merkabah)', 2),
(@lesson7_id, 'What does the valley of dry bones vision represent?', 'multiple_choice', 'Israel\'s restoration', 3),
(@lesson7_id, 'What was Daniel\'s position in Babylon?', 'multiple_choice', 'A Jewish official in the Babylonian court', 4),
(@lesson7_id, 'What did Daniel refuse to do?', 'multiple_choice', 'Compromise his faith despite pressure', 5),
(@lesson7_id, 'What are Daniel\'s famous visions about?', 'multiple_choice', 'Future kingdoms and God\'s ultimate victory', 6),
(@lesson7_id, 'What does Daniel 7:13-14 describe?', 'multiple_choice', 'The son of man coming with clouds of heaven', 7),
(@lesson7_id, 'What is the significance of the four kingdoms in Daniel?', 'multiple_choice', 'They represent future world powers', 8),
(@lesson7_id, 'What does the 70 weeks prophecy in Daniel concern?', 'multiple_choice', 'The restoration of Jerusalem and the coming of the Messiah', 9),
(@lesson7_id, 'What theme is central to both Ezekiel and Daniel?', 'multiple_choice', 'God\'s sovereignty despite earthly circumstances', 10),
(@lesson7_id, 'Discuss how Ezekiel and Daniel provide hope during exile.', 'short_answer', '', 11);

-- Lesson 8 Questions
SET @lesson8_id = (SELECT id FROM lessons WHERE courseId = (SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'BIB101') AND lessonOrder = 8 LIMIT 1);
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(@lesson8_id, 'Why are they called the Minor Prophets?', 'multiple_choice', 'Because they are shorter, not less important', 1),
(@lesson8_id, 'How many Minor Prophets are there?', 'multiple_choice', 'Twelve', 2),
(@lesson8_id, 'What does Hosea use as a metaphor for God\'s covenant?', 'multiple_choice', 'Marriage', 3),
(@lesson8_id, 'What does Joel prophesy about?', 'multiple_choice', 'The day of the Lord and outpouring of God\'s Spirit', 4),
(@lesson8_id, 'What is Amos\'s main concern?', 'multiple_choice', 'God\'s justice and concern for the poor', 5),
(@lesson8_id, 'What does Amos 5:24 say?', 'multiple_choice', 'Let justice roll down like waters', 6),
(@lesson8_id, 'Who is Jonah sent to preach to?', 'multiple_choice', 'The people of Nineveh', 7),
(@lesson8_id, 'What does Jonah\'s story teach about God?', 'multiple_choice', 'God\'s grace and mercy extended to all nations', 8),
(@lesson8_id, 'Where does Micah prophesy the Messiah will be born?', 'multiple_choice', 'Bethlehem', 9),
(@lesson8_id, 'What does Micah 6:8 say God requires?', 'multiple_choice', 'Justice, mercy, and humility', 10),
(@lesson8_id, 'Analyze the themes of justice and mercy in the first six Minor Prophets.', 'short_answer', '', 11);

-- Lesson 9 Questions
SET @lesson9_id = (SELECT id FROM lessons WHERE courseId = (SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'BIB101') AND lessonOrder = 9 LIMIT 1);
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(@lesson9_id, 'What does Nahum prophesy?', 'multiple_choice', 'God\'s judgment on Nineveh', 1),
(@lesson9_id, 'What is Habakkuk\'s main struggle?', 'multiple_choice', 'Wrestling with God about injustice', 2),
(@lesson9_id, 'What does Habakkuk 2:4 teach?', 'multiple_choice', 'The righteous will live by faith', 3),
(@lesson9_id, 'What is Zephaniah\'s main theme?', 'multiple_choice', 'The day of the Lord', 4),
(@lesson9_id, 'What does Zephaniah 3:17 say about God?', 'multiple_choice', 'The Lord rejoices over you with singing', 5),
(@lesson9_id, 'What is Haggai\'s message?', 'multiple_choice', 'Encouragement to rebuild the temple', 6),
(@lesson9_id, 'What does Haggai 2:4-5 promise?', 'multiple_choice', 'God\'s presence with His people', 7),
(@lesson9_id, 'What does Zechariah prophesy?', 'multiple_choice', 'Restoration and messianic prophecies', 8),
(@lesson9_id, 'What does Zechariah 9:9 describe?', 'multiple_choice', 'The king coming righteous and victorious', 9),
(@lesson9_id, 'What is Malachi\'s final message?', 'multiple_choice', 'Promise of Elijah\'s return', 10),
(@lesson9_id, 'Discuss how the final six Minor Prophets address post-exilic hopes.', 'short_answer', '', 11);

-- Lesson 10 Questions
SET @lesson10_id = (SELECT id FROM lessons WHERE courseId = (SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'BIB101') AND lessonOrder = 10 LIMIT 1);
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(@lesson10_id, 'What is the covenant theme in the Old Testament?', 'multiple_choice', 'God\'s progressive revelation through covenants', 1),
(@lesson10_id, 'What are the four major covenants?', 'multiple_choice', 'Abrahamic, Mosaic, Davidic, and New', 2),
(@lesson10_id, 'What does the sacrificial system foreshadow?', 'multiple_choice', 'Christ\'s ultimate sacrifice', 3),
(@lesson10_id, 'What is the protoevangelium?', 'multiple_choice', 'The first gospel promise in Genesis 3:15', 4),
(@lesson10_id, 'What does the Passover represent?', 'multiple_choice', 'Christ\'s redemption', 5),
(@lesson10_id, 'What is a type in biblical interpretation?', 'multiple_choice', 'A person, event, or thing that foreshadows Christ', 6),
(@lesson10_id, 'How does the Old Testament point to Christ?', 'multiple_choice', 'Through prophecy, type, and covenant', 7),
(@lesson10_id, 'What is the theme of God\'s faithfulness?', 'multiple_choice', 'Despite human failure, God remains faithful', 8),
(@lesson10_id, 'What does the kingdom theme reveal?', 'multiple_choice', 'God\'s kingdom progressively revealed and established in Christ', 9),
(@lesson10_id, 'What is the restoration theme?', 'multiple_choice', 'God\'s consistent work to restore His people and creation', 10),
(@lesson10_id, 'Synthesize the major themes of the Old Testament and their fulfillment in Christ.', 'short_answer', '', 11);
